description: PRED-105 (46° copper coils / cucumber growth >=15% over 14 days) STILL labeled 'PENDING — PROSPECTIVE' approximately 171.8 hours (~7.16 days) after its 2026-04-18T00:00:00Z test-window closure. notes: This is an early-morning poll (03:45Z) — most prior polls were afternoon/late-morning UTC. Consequence: today's daily_review auto-regen, which runs ~07:09-07:12Z, has not yet fired this poll cycle. The next ~3.5 hours are the high-information window. Watch points for next poll: (1) refined 4 -> 5 in daily_review.json would indicate post-hoc adjudication of PRED-105 — flag CRITICAL; (2) refined holding at 4 would extend pipeline-canonical silent-ignore to 4 consecutive auto-regens; (3) any goalpost-move on PRED-105 window text ('April 18, 2026 (14-day window)' rewritten) — CRITICAL; (4) any manual commit breaking the 7.65-day streak — substantive minimum, parameter/canary diff required. Counterargument for record (per user preference): 7.65-day manual-commit drought spanning a weekend is not anomalous in isolation for a personal project, and the author has previously shipped large batches after silences (e.g. 2026-04-17 shipped 3 manual commits in ~25 minutes after a comparable gap). Opposing consideration: the drought is suspicious only when read alongside PRED-105 silent-ignore — an author-on-break explanation does not account for build_daily_review.py canonicalising the exclusion; if the author were merely on break we would expect the auto-pipeline's registry_ratio_pct to track actual passes/failures rather than holding constant through what would otherwise be an acknowledged-failure event. Site values, parameters, and load-bearing pages all unchanged this poll. predictions.html byte-identical for 10 polls (md5=885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785). No canary-trigger filenames in repo tree. proofs/ directory unchanged (still 6 files; weekly_predictions_2026-03-15.json still missing its .ots companion across 12 polls). scripts/build_daily_review.py unchanged since 2026-04-17 a57e731. monitor.py unchanged since 2026-04-05 8e4bf9b. API data sources unchanged: scorecard 26 confirmed / 1 falsified / 20 pending = 26/27 = 96.3% (last_updated 2026-03-06, frozen 50 days); current/results 35 items, 35 'passed' (1 below_detection_threshold + 1 confirmed_strong + 33 confirmed), counts_against_model=false for all.
